steps.title: Read slope from the parallel line
steps.content: Line $s$ is parallel to $y = 18x + 2$. Parallel lines have equal slopes, so slope of $s$ $= 18$.

steps.title: Write line s through the origin and evaluate at x = 4
steps.content: Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$ with slope $18$: $y = 18x$. Substitute $x = 4$: $d = 18 \times 4 = 72$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
